data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for SMS/app notifications when a customer's number is approaching. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation of this feature, nor is there any record of SMS notifications being sent as described in the use case. The absence of such evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting the specified requirement.
gaps: No evidence of SMS/app notifications being sent when the number is approaching.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
